final:
// // This module decrements the count on each rising edge of the clock when the pulse input is high, resetting to zero when the reset signal is low.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input pulse,
    output reg [31:0] count
);always @(posedge clk or negedge rst) begin
    if (!rst) begin
        count <= 0;
    end else if (pulse) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module decrements the count on each rising edge of the clock when the pulse input is high, resetting to zero when the reset signal is low.
